title: Elytra Tri
description: Give your Elytra a fresh, elegant look with Elytra Tri — a sleek retexture designed to upgrade your wings without altering vanilla balance
body:
## About

This resource pack replaces the Elytra model.

![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9488f16ec89ceb1e2f7302ea8311f5947975a04d.png)

Ancient legends say that elytra are not just wings, but a traveler's seal between worlds. Elytra Tri awakens their true nature, replacing the ordinary shell of beetle wings with a sophisticated fabric worthy of heroes who make history.

The new pattern shimmers with the colors of the ocean depths and glitters like the scales of an ancient dragon, reminiscent of a time when the sky was the arena of the brave.

Without changing any of the magic of the blocks or the mechanics of the world, this resource pack adds an air of nobility, allowing you to not just fly, but glide majestically beyond the boundaries of the known.

- Compatible with all enchantments, servers, and resource packs
- Supports Minecraft versions 1.20–1.21.1
- Easy installation with no additional settings

Put on Elytra Tri, and even dragons will envy your wings.
